nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.summary: OpenAI is a company that develops and releases AI models, including GPT-5.

nodes.name: GPT-5
nodes.summary: GPT-5 is an AI model developed by OpenAI that requires a mandatory enterprise license for API access.

nodes.name: Meta
nodes.summary: Meta is a company that releases open-source models, including those that benchmark within 8% of GPT-4 performance.

nodes.name: GPT-4
nodes.summary: GPT-4 is an AI model that serves as a benchmark for other models, including those released by Meta.

nodes.name: Stanford
nodes.summary: Stanford is a research institution where researchers have published findings on the impact of the new pricing model for AI access.

nodes.name: Enterprise license
nodes.summary: The enterprise license is a mandatory license required for API access to GPT-5, costing $200 per month.
